commands.summary: Independent cross-environment reproduction from the public repository at 7f8eacf: 635 passing, verified_current audit, byte-identical file checksums.

summary: Verified completion of PLAN-20260722-0001 at commit 7f8eacf: ABS-0004 Slice A invocation provenance capture on the scripts/compare_providers.py path. ai_lab/providers/invocation_record.py delivers schema v1 for InvocationRecord, minimal EffectiveInputManifest, and ExecutionProfile, with validate_invocation_record as the acceptance gate, byte-stable canonical JSON matching the sidecar precedent, deterministic paths under docs/invocations/, and identity computed over the enumerated version-scoped subset IDENTITY_FIELDS_V1. ai_lab/providers/invocation_capture.py wires emission on the admitted path only and returns a (record, error) pair so capture failure is reported without aborting the provider call. All eight WARR-20260722-0001 conditions are evidenced by tests: condition 1 by the capture_path validator rejection plus source assertions that scripts/ask_provider.py neither imports the capture module nor emits records; condition 2 by byte-identity of canonical serialization for semantically identical records and distinctness of identities across prompt, session, and timestamp variation; condition 3 by a capture failure against an unwritable root that is reported to stderr while the provider result survives; condition 4 by a test that simulated Slice B and C field additions leave an existing identity unchanged and by the documented versioning rule; condition 5 by session identity as a scalar field with Run and ProtocolRound absent; condition 6 by tests that the environment override wins over the raised default, that no other default moved, and that the governance marker defaults to experimental; condition 7 by required session identity, per-rejection-class fixtures, and GraphRelation-only relation emission; condition 8 by SLICE_A_PREDICATES enforcement that rejects any predicate outside the ABS-0004 Section 5 list. The governed settings rider raised AI_LAB_CLAUDE_MAX_TOKENS from 4096 to 16000. First real capture at COMP-0035 produced two valid records sharing one session with matching prompt digests and produced_by references in the artifact; those records revalidate, recompute their identities, and are byte-identical to canonical form on disk. The first run also exposed three fidelity gaps no fixture caught, fixed at 7f8eacf: ambiguous null token limits now carry an explicit max_tokens_source, runtime_version is populated from SDK metadata, and structured artifact metadata serializes as JSON rather than a Python repr. Tests grew from 580 to 635; the repository audit reports ok true verified_current; commit 7f8eacf pulled from the public GitHub repository into a separate environment reproduced 635 passing tests, the verified_current audit, and byte-identical checksums for every delivered file.
